payload.goal: Review the workflow improvements made to orchestrator prompts
payload.why: Verify the changes are correct, complete, and don't introduce issues
changes: Added self-service model: subagent reads JSON file from path
Added summary generation: 2-3 sentence summary before delegation
Removed AGENT.md parsing section (was creating unwanted coupling)
done_when: Review complete with approval or feedback
architecture_decisions: File-path self-service model: subagent reads JSON, not inline
AGENT.md as black box: agent software loads it, orchestrator doesn't parse
Summary-first UX: user sees summary, JSON hidden for audit
review_focus: Are the workflow contract changes correct?
Any issues with the self-service model?
